name: Jordyn Rush
subject: What people ask me...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6202238319397437440/3472298402446835712?refcode=e20160410&refcode2=e20160410nd&amount=25)
---
When people ask me why they should invest in **this race** , friend, I could list a whole mess of reasons.

But there's one simple way to explain why your dollar can make a huge difference in our country's future:**Control of the U.S. Senate will come down to Pennsylvania 's seat.** I'm not the only one who thinks we have what it takes to win. Here's just a sample of what everyone is saying about our race:

* _Center for Politics_ and _Cook Political Report_ : PA Senate race upgraded from from "Leans Republican" to "Toss Up"
* _Washington Post_ : #5 Senate seat "most likely to change parties in November"
* _The Hill_ : One of "top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2016"
* _National Journal_ : #7 most competitive Senate race "mostly likely to flip party control"
* _Politico_ : Pat Toomey is "one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for reelection this year"

And according to the latest from _Harper Polling_ , **we 've jumped 14 points in the last five weeks** and are closing the gap on our primary opponent.

[**With your support right now, we will defeat Pat Toomey and take back our Democratic Senate majority. Make an urgent grassroots contribution today so Katie can win her primary and focus on beating Toomey in November:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6202238319397437440/3472298402446835712?refcode=e20160410&refcode2=e20160410nd&amount=25)** Every dollar counts!**

Thank you!

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6202238319397437440/3472298402446835712?refcode=e20160410&refcode2=e20160410nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6202238319397437440/3400240808408907776).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Not for sale
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
If there's one thing people know about Bernie Sanders, it's that he's not for sale.
No number of bankers can stop Bernie from breaking up the banks.
No amount of fossil fuel lobbyists can bundle enough money to stop Bernie from opposing fracking and doing everything in his power to fight climate change.
There aren't enough Big Pharma CEOs in the world to stop Bernie from getting universal health care.
**Bernie's not for sale. But that means he needs you.**
[**Add your $2.70 contribution now to Bernie's campaign to show the political establishment that our movement can't be bought.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies-not-for-sale?refcode=em160410v3-sub-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies-not-for-sale?refcode=em160410v3-sub-a")
Every time someone contributes to our campaign, it's a message the billionaire class hears loud and clear. That has them very nervous. Let's keep them on their toes.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies-not-for-sale?refcode=em160410v3-sub-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernies-not-for-sale?refcode=em160410v3-sub-a")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America
body:
Memo: Campaign Update
From: Beth Hansen, Campaign
Manager

We're going to a contested
convention. With your ongoing support, we'll gather enough
delegates to stop Trump from securing the nomination on the first
ballot and we will defeat both him and Ted Cruz on subsequent
ballots when delegates select the candidate who is best prepared
to defeat Hillary in the fall AND who can actually be President.

We're confident that Republicans
are starting to wake up to the fact that a Trump/Cruz nomination
would not only result in a Hillary win, but likely also the loss
of the majority in the U.S. Senate. We cannot allow that to
happen.

The rest of the April calendar
plays in our favor as we're looking to finish strong and win more
delegates in: New York, Pennsylvania, Connecticut, Maryland,
Rhode Island and Delaware.

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

New York, New York!

Gov. Kasich spent several days in
New York last week and also one stop in Fairfield, CT to attend
Town Hall events with voters. Our crowds have been growing and on
Saturday, we had 4,000 people come out for one event in
Rochester. (See more pictures at the end of the email)

Rochester Town Hall Main Room

Rochester Town Hall Overflow Room

Polls clearly show that Trump has
a commanding lead but New York & Pennsylvania award delegates
proportionally by congressional districts, so we expect to be
extremely competitive in walking away with delegates. Polls also
show that Gov. Kasich is more likely to win these districts than
Ted Cruz, so it's our hope that Republican leaders offer us the
same support they recently showed Cruz in earlier states to deny
Trump delegates.

In case you haven't seen our new
TV ad that makes the case for why New York voters should support
Gov. Kasich in an effort to stop Trump and stop Hillary:

Watch a short New York recap
video:

Captains For Kasich & Phone From
Home

In case you're not signed up yet
to help with our grassroots programs, here are two that you can
join today:

National Phone From Home:
JohnKasich.com/PhoneFromHome

Download our mobile app, sign in
and make calls to help support Gov. John Kasich. Turn your home
into a mini grassroots phone center today!

Captains For Kasich:
Captains.JohnKasich.com

100 Days Until the Convention!

Saturday was an important
milestone as it marked the point when we were just 100 days away
from the Republican National Convention in Cleveland, OH. We're
coming down the homestretch and it's critical that we finish with
the wind at our backs! Please consider a quick contribution to
help: JohnKasich.com/Donate

Endorsements & Team News:

General Michael Hayden Endorses
John Kasich for President

ENDORSEMENT: California Assembly
Republican Leader Chad Mayes Supports John Kasich for President

ENDORSEMENT: California
Assemblyman Rocky Chávez Supports John Kasich for President

Detroit News: Kasich Is Still the
Best Choice

Huffington Post: John Kasich Will
Be the Republican Nominee for President

U.S. News & World Report: The
Case for Kasich

Kasich for America Announces
Co-Chairs in the State of Washington

Washington Post: Kasich Running
Second in Maryland

Kasich for America Announces
Expansion of Maryland Leadership Team

Wall Street Journal: The Real
Kasich Threat

Huntington, NY Town Hall w/ Fox's
Greta Van Susteren

Syracuse, NY Town Hall

Brooklyn, NY Town Hall w/ Montel
Williams

Lunch at Mike's Deli in The Bronx

Paid for by Kasich for America
JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oW4pMd_CN1

**Momentum for Katie builds across Pennsylvania!
[Pitch in now to keep it going! $5 makes a huge difference >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-281128510288822272/-6831937544976859136?refcode=e20160410.2&refcode2=e20160410.2nd&amount=25)** Friend, we wanted to share some highlights from the campaign this week:

* Katie made us proud at two debates this week, showing Pennsylvania why she's truly the working families' candidate.

* She campaigned in Pittsburgh with Vice President Joe Biden, Pennsylvania's native son.

* And she won the endorsement of the state AFL-CIO, representing more than 800,000 workers!

**And get this: Katie has jumped 14 points in the polls since March 1!** Her momentum is undeniable -- but we need YOU to help us keep it up!

[**Will you chip in now to keep Katie 's momentum going ahead? Katie needs your help to ensure she wins her primary and can focus on defeating Pat Toomey this fall.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-281128510288822272/-6831937544976859136?refcode=e20160410.2&refcode2=e20160410.2nd&amount=25)

name: Maryland for Bernie
subject: The path to victory in Maryland
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
April 26th will be here before you know it, and we're excited to announce the availability of in-state calling for Maryland on our Bernie Dialer!
We think Bernie has strong support in Maryland, so we've set an ambitious goal: **we want to call 20,000 voters in Marylandthis week.** To meet this goal, we're going to need **750** of you on the phones for at least two hours this week. **Can we count on you to get on the phone and call Maryland voters?**
**[Yes, I'll make calls to Maryland voters»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/mdphonebank/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/mdphonebank/")**
These short and simple calls - using our efficient Bernie Dialer system - are crucial to identify Bernie supporters throughout the state. Our get-out-the-vote teams will then follow up with them and make sure they cast their votes for Bernie.
Our goal is ambitious, but we think we can win Maryland on April 26th and take another chunk out of our opponent's current delegate lead. **But we need your help.**
[**We hope you can pitch in and make some calls.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/mdphonebank/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/mdphonebank/")
In solidarity,
Maryland for Bernie
P.S. Our staff and volunteers are already out in the field, working hard to get Bernie supporters to the polls on April 26th. **[Come join us at an event near you!](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=bernie-event&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassing&f%5B%5D=ballot-access&f%5B%5D=carpool&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=barnstorm&f%5B%5D=other "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&sort=time&f%5B%5D=campaign-office&f%5B%5D=bernie-event&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassing&f%5B%5D=ballot-access&f%5B%5D=carpool&f%5B%5D=register-voters&f%5B%5D=barnstorm&f%5B%5D=other")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Joe Sestak
subject: The Philadelphia Inquirer: It's not what you say, but what you do
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b30/2626341350/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, I have not asked a politician or an organization for their endorsement during this campaign, although I am taken when PA citizens have offered theirs. Today, I learned that **_The Philadelphia Inquirer_ - our state's largest newspaper - endorsed our candidacy.** It's not the endorsement of our candidacy, but what _The Inquirer_ wrote about it that matters:
* "his willingness to put principle above party"
* "the best credentials and experience to immediately serve Pennsylvania and the nation"
* "he can maneuver beyond partisan politics to help the middle class rebound from years of stagnant wages"
* "Sestak's refusal to be put into a partisan box"
* "a deep understanding of government and foreign policy that Katie McGinty and John Fetterman cannot match."

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b3f/2626341350/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FBb1&amounts=25,50,75,150,300,500,1000")
---

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b3e/2626341350/VEsF/ "http://www.philly.com/philly/opinion/20160410_Inquirer_editorial__Sestak_is_the_better_choice_for_Democrats.html")
---

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b3d/2626341350/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FBb2&amounts=25,50,75,150,300,500,1000")
---
As I type this en route to an African American church service, I remember what another black pastor once said to me, "Joe, I'll know when you're good, when what you do speaks so loudly, I can't hear what you say."
I don't just want to win, I want to govern ... and one can only do that with the trust of the people, which is based on deeds not words.
So it is the deeds that that The Inquirer spoke of that matter: principle above party, people above politics, a warrior who has demonstrated strength but understandable caution of the use of our military in foreign affairs.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b3c/2626341350/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FBb3&amounts=25,50,75,150,300,500,1000")
---
Peter, I thank _The Inquirer_ for their acknowledgement of what accountability to our nation, to people, actually means for a public servant.
[With two weeks to go, please contribute what you can today - $25, $50, $75, $100 - so that I can continue to gain the endorsement of the people of Pennsylvania in this election!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b3b/2626341350/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FBp1&amounts=25,50,75,150,300,500,1000")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b3a/2626341350/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FBb4&amounts=25,50,75,150,300,500,1000")
---

Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b39/2626341350/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b38/2626341350/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b27/2626341350/VEsHBQ/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ad0/3476a20e/d8d07ae/27422b26/2626341350/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: If you’re with Hillary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
They're getting desperate | Friend --

It’s clear that Bernie and his campaign are desperate to regain momentum in this race -- they’re down more than 200 delegates and 2 million votes, so they’re saying whatever it takes to try to turn things their way, including the outrageous lie that Hillary isn’t qualified to be president.

They won Wisconsin and tied in delegates in Wyoming this week -- but the math is on our side. We’re heading into a huge contest in New York just nine days from now, and it’s time for us to show them exactly how strong our team is.

**If you’re with Hillary, chip in right now to claim your free sticker and help bring home a decisive win in New York -- let’s lock down this nomination once and for all:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUxOTg4ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNTU4Nzc0S0&mt=1&rt=0). name: Team Sestak
subject: The best to beat Toomey
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/27422944/808917703/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, We must win the primary, but _The Philadelphia Inquirer 's_ endorsement this morning shows _why Joe is the best candidate to beat Sen. Toomey in the general_ in this anti-establishment year of independence: "Sestak's refusal to be put into a partisan box" and "his willingness to put principle above party." This is exactly what the people of Pennsylvania want... particularly in a year of unease among the Republicans in their Presidential candidate. **[With 16 days to go, please contribute $15, $20, $35, or what ever you can this evening to ensure that the best candidate to beat Toomey wins the primary](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/27422943/808917703/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FB2p1&amounts=15,20,35,50,100,250,500"):** _we are up 10 in the polls, but now outspent by outside special interests_. Ensure our general election win with Joe's win in the primary. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/27422942/808917703/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FB2b1&amounts=15,20,35,50,100,250,500")
---
And please share the endorsement article (linked in the image below) with your contact list, and symbolically chip in the cost of a copy of the paper for each friend:
[That's $2 for sharing with 1 friend, $10 for sharing with 5 friends, and $30 for sharing with 15 friends](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/27422941/808917703/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FB2p2&amounts=2,5,10,30,50,100,200"):
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/27422940/808917703/VEsD/ "http://www.philly.com/philly/opinion/20160410_Inquirer_editorial__Sestak_is_the_better_choice_for_Democrats.html")
---

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/2742294f/808917703/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0410FB2b2&amounts=15,20,35,50,100,250,500")
---

The fact that Joe won the primary despite the Washington D.C. political establishment's opposition is a key to why he will win in the general with your support in this primary!
-Team Sestak

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719ae8/3476a20e/d8da6b0/2742294e/808917703/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[

Media, PA 19063

name: Donna Edwards
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
On Thursday, voters across Maryland will head to their early vote locations and cast the first ballots in this election.
We expect a big percentage -- maybe even as high as half -- of all voters to cast their votes early. We must reach them right now before they vote.
**Rush a contribution of $5 so we can hit our $45,000 early vote goal and reach every voter before this critical period. If we don't hit our early vote goal, we could lose our shot at winning this tough primary: **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e578/1236990754/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**
**[Express Donate: $25](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e579/1236990754/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Express Donate: $50](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e576/1236990754/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Express Donate: $100](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e577/1236990754/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UkNCOWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=100")**
**[Donate Another Amount](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e574/1236990754/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
This is a battle over the future of the Democratic Party -- and it's one we have to win.
Do we want a party that is built by big donors in the establishment and _their_ interests? Or do we want our party defined by grassroots donors and the voices of working people?
Because if we give working people a majority in the Senate, and a real voice, we _will_ stop the bad trade deals that sell out workers and the environment, we _will_ expand Social Security, and we _will_ hold Wall Street accountable. **But that can only happen if we go all in and win this tough race.**
**[Make a contribution to our $45,000 early vote goal so we can reach every voter and win this close election. In a race this close every dollar matters.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e574/1236990754/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for being a part of this,
Donna
**[](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e574/1236990754/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEwLU5EIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160410-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
** **
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e575/1236990754/VEsO/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). If you would like to contribute to Donna's campaign to be Maryland's next Senator [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e572/1236990754/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaWDE5IjoiZW0yMDE2MDQxMC1ORCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dfesplash?refcode=footer_em20160410-ND") If you want to learn more about Donna, please visit [www.donnaedwardsforsenate.com](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e573/1236990754/VEsHBQ/ "http://donnaedwardsforsenate.com"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails from the Donna Edwards for Senate Campaign, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff2/767134fb/5c6cf81b/4338e570/1236990754/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
Donna Edwards for Senate
P.O Box 44305
Ft. Washington, MD 20749

****
